name: Deployment Validation
description: Comprehensive post-deployment validation of all Tableau-to-Fabric migration artifacts, connections, lakehouse tables, and semantic model integrity.

tasks.name: Verify Workspace
tasks.description: Check workspace exists and is accessible via Fabric REST API.

tasks.name: List Workspace Items
tasks.description: Retrieve all items in the workspace via paginated GET /workspaces/{id}/items to verify presence of expected artifacts.

tasks.name: Validate Item Presence
tasks.description: Compare expected artifacts from project directory against workspace items. Check for Lakehouse, Notebook, Dataflow, SemanticModel, Report, Pipeline.

tasks.name: Check SQL Endpoint
tasks.description: Verify Lakehouse SQL analytics endpoint is provisioned and returns a valid connection string.

tasks.name: Check Lakehouse Tables
tasks.description: Enumerate Delta tables in each Lakehouse via GET /lakehouses/{id}/tables and verify expected tables exist.

tasks.name: Check Dataflow Connections
tasks.description: Verify DataflowGen2 connections are bound with OAuth2 credentials for data refresh capability.

tasks.name: Validate Workspace Folders
tasks.description: Check that workspace folders exist and items are correctly organized.

tasks.name: Report Summary
tasks.description: Generate pass/fail summary report for all validation checks with detailed status per item and portal link.
